calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Amanda Millea, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Discover Bank.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Jian X. Chen.
Witness Evin F. Culp sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Court denies Plaintiff's counsel's oral motion to strike Defendant's Answer.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Discover Bank and against Defendant Jian X. Chen as follows:
Principal $19,468.24
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $435.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $19,903.24

Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MONA AMINI, ESQ. of Kazerouni Law Group, APC, Tel No. 800-400-6808 appearing telephonically for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Attorney Mona Amini, Esq.'s Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Defendant Jian X. Chen is granted. JUDICIAL COUNCIL ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Continued To Nov-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Set For Trial On Sep-08-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
